prestazioni: Engine swap to a **L15B7** (1.5L DOHC i-VTEC Turbo, 174 PS stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger, upgraded **HKS Hi-Power 80mm intercooler**, and **Toda Racing forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)** for 300+ WHP on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include **Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors**, **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump**, and a **Hondata KPro V4 ECU** with custom turbo mapping for the L15B platform.

Full **Tein Flex Z coilovers (Honda Fit/Jazz/Mobilio-specific valving)** with **Eibach Pro-Kit helper springs** for aggressive stance and cornering, paired with **Cusco 22mm front/19mm rear sway bars** and **SuperPro poly bushings (part #SPF1044K)** to eliminate chassis flex in the Mobilio Spike’s unibody.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **PPG Stage 2 clutch (L15B-specific)** and **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (5.45 final drive ratio)** for the **Honda Jazz RS (GD8) 5-speed transmission**, mated to a **Toda Racing lightweight flywheel (4.5kg)**. Axles upgraded to **Driveshaft Shop 3.5" CV axles** to handle increased torque.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Mobilio Spike widebody kit (2014-2017 specific)** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** and **Rocket Bunny-style side skirts**, retaining the OEM rear hatch for a sleeper look. Painted in **PPG Honda Milano Red (R-81M) with matte black accents**.

**Voltex Type-3 rear wing (JDM-spec, 1,200mm width)** mounted on **custom aluminum pedestals** to clear the Mobilio Spike’s rear wiper, paired with a **Seibon carbon fiber hood (part #CF-HON-0814)** featuring a **custom heat extractor duct** for the intercooler piping.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x8 +35 front, 17x9 +30 rear)** in **Gunmetal Bronze**, wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD09 (215/40/17 front, 245/35/17 rear)**. Brake upgrade includes **Project Mu 2-piece rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear)** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
